name: Maya R.
description: Teen girl with shoulder-length black hair and a small scar near her left eyebrow.
clothing: Blue rain jacket, silver backpack, black sneakers.
summary: Maya R. was separated from her aunt during flood evacuation intake at the Riverside High School gym.
redactedNotes: Aunt reported Maya was last seen near the Riverside High School gym intake line after flood evacuation. She wore a blue rain jacket and carried a silver backpack.

name: Omar H.
description: Teen boy, about 5 feet 8 inches, short dark hair, anxious, looking for his mother.
clothing: Gray hoodie, wet black shoes, navy track pants.
summary: Omar H. was last seen after flood evacuation at the North Arena shelter.
redactedNotes: Family friend sounded worried. Said Omar was separated near the North Arena shelter after buses arrived. He may ask for his mother in Arabic or English.

name: Lina Chen
description: Child with straight dark hair, glasses, and a small yellow notebook.
clothing: Red coat, white shoes, blue backpack.
summary: Lina Chen was reported missing during wildfire relocation at the Eastside Community Center.
redactedNotes: Parent reported Lina was waiting near Eastside Community Center check-in during the wildfire relocation and then could not be found.

name: Daniel Brooks
description: Older man with gray beard, uses a cane, may be confused during power outage.
clothing: Green baseball cap, tan jacket, brown shoes.
summary: Daniel Brooks was last seen near the Westside Cooling Center during a city power outage.
redactedNotes: Cooling center staff reported Daniel Brooks left the seating area and may have moved toward the bus line.

name: Samira A.
description: Young child, braided hair, quiet, may be afraid to speak to strangers.
clothing: Purple sweatshirt, denim skirt, yellow socks.
summary: Samira A. was separated from a volunteer group at the downtown storm bus pickup.
redactedNotes: Volunteer was unsure of exact time. Samira was with a group boarding buses after the storm. She wore a purple sweatshirt and yellow socks.

name: Elena Garcia
description: Adult woman, curly brown hair, may be carrying a small pet carrier.
summary: Elena Garcia was reported missing after wildfire shelter registration at Hillview community center.
redactedNotes: Caller gave [REDACTED PHONE] and said Elena was last seen near [REDACTED ADDRESS]. She may have had a small pet carrier.

name: Maya
description: Teen girl with dark hair and a mark near one eyebrow, appeared cold but calm.
clothing: Blue jacket, silver backpack, black sneakers.
summary: Shelter staff saw a teen named Maya near the Riverside gym registration table.
redactedNotes: Shelter staff saw a teen called Maya near the Riverside gym registration table. She wore a blue jacket and had a silver backpack.

name: Omar
description: Teen boy asking for his mom, wet shoes, short dark hair.
clothing: Gray hoodie, navy pants, wet black shoes.
summary: Direct witness saw a teen named Omar near the North Arena bus pickup after flood evacuation.
redactedNotes: Witness saw a teen named Omar near the North Arena bus pickup. He asked for his mother in Arabic and English.

name: Unknown child
description: Young girl with glasses holding a yellow notebook.
summary: Volunteer saw a child who may have responded to Lina waiting by the Eastside Community Center water table.
redactedNotes: Volunteer saw a child who may have responded to Lina waiting by the Eastside Community Center water table. She had glasses and a yellow notebook.

name: Unknown older man
description: Older man with gray beard using a cane, seemed tired.
summary: Shelter staff saw an older man near the cooling center bus line.
redactedNotes: Shelter staff saw an older man near the cooling center bus line. He had a cane and wore a green cap.

name: Noah P.
description: Child in a purple sweatshirt seen before the downtown buses loaded.
summary: Social media post described a child in a purple sweatshirt at the Harbor terminal before the storm bus pickup opened.
redactedNotes: Social media post described a child in a purple sweatshirt at the Harbor terminal before the storm bus pickup opened. Source could not be reached for follow-up.

name: Yusuf K.
description: Teen boy with short dark hair in a gray hoodie asking about family.
summary: A volunteer note mentioned Yusuf K. near North Arena one day before Omar was last seen.
redactedNotes: Volunteer note mentioned Yusuf K. near North Arena one day before Omar was last seen. Details may be from an older intake sheet.
